    int wireEncodedSize() {
{%- if record.is_empty() %}

    void wireEncodeTo(WireWriter wire) {
{%- for field in record.fields %}
        {{ field.wire_encode_expr }};
{%- endfor %}
    }

    byte[] wireEncodeToBytes() {
        try (WireWriter wire = new WireWriter(wireEncodedSize())) {
            wireEncodeTo(wire);
            java.nio.ByteBuffer buf = wire.toBuffer();
            byte[] bytes = new byte[buf.remaining()];
            buf.get(bytes);
            return bytes;
        }
    }

{% if let Some(layout) = record.blittable_layout %}
    static final int STRUCT_SIZE = {{ layout.struct_size }};
{%- for field in layout.fields %}
    private static final int OFFSET_{{ field.const_name }} = {{ field.offset }};
{%- endfor %}

    private static {{ record.class_name }} decodeBlittableFromBuffer(ByteBuffer buf, int base) {

    private static void writeBlittableToBuffer(ByteBuffer buf, int base, {{ record.class_name }} item) {
{%- for field in layout.fields %}
        {{ field.encode_expr }};
{%- endfor %}
    }

    static List<{{ record.class_name }}> decodeBlittableVec(WireReader reader) {
        int count = reader.readI32();
        if (count == 0) return Collections.emptyList();
        ByteBuffer buf = reader.readBlittableBuffer(count, STRUCT_SIZE);
        List<{{ record.class_name }}> result = new ArrayList<>(count);
        for (int index = 0; index < count; index++) {
            result.add(decodeBlittableFromBuffer(buf, index * STRUCT_SIZE));
        }
        return result;
    }

    static List<{{ record.class_name }}> decodeBlittableVecFromRawBuffer(byte[] raw) {
        if (raw == null || raw.length == 0) return Collections.emptyList();
        if (raw.length % STRUCT_SIZE != 0) {
            throw new RuntimeException("corrupt buffer: invalid blittable vec length for {{ record.class_name }}");
        }
        ByteBuffer buf = ByteBuffer.wrap(raw).order(ByteOrder.LITTLE_ENDIAN);
        int count = raw.length / STRUCT_SIZE;
        List<{{ record.class_name }}> result = new ArrayList<>(count);
        for (int index = 0; index < count; index++) {
            result.add(decodeBlittableFromBuffer(buf, index * STRUCT_SIZE));
        }
        return result;
    }

    static void encodeBlittableVec(WireWriter wire, List<{{ record.class_name }}> items) {
        wire.writeI32(items.size());
        int byteCount = items.size() * STRUCT_SIZE;
        wire.writeRawBytes(byteCount, (buf, baseOffset) -> {
            for (int index = 0; index < items.size(); index++) {
                int base = baseOffset + index * STRUCT_SIZE;
                writeBlittableToBuffer(buf, base, items.get(index));
            }
        });
    }
{% endif %}
